plugin.name: music-search
command.description: Search with music-search ({provider}), play audio, and save favorites.
sort.title: Title
status.searchPrompt: Search {provider}, paste a URL, or open a saved track.
errors.queueFailed: Could not add track to queue.
errors.queuePlaylistTrackFailed: Could not add playlist track to queue.
errors.folderImportFailed: Could not import folder as playlist.
search.title: Search with music-search
search.hint: Try `>music-search burial`, `yt: burial`, `sc: artist`, `local: song`, `queue`, `#night`, `artist:name`, `rating:>=4`, `provider:local`, `playlist:name`, `speed:1.05`, or paste a URL.
search.noResults: No saved or search results for "{query}".
search.typeMore: Type at least 2 characters to search {provider}.
library.label: Library
library.emptyDesc: Save search results and they will show up here next time.
library.noFilterMatches: No saved tracks matched your filters.
home.mostPlayedDesc: The tracks you come back to most.
home.tagsDesc: Browse your library by mood and theme.
home.artistsDesc: Jump through your saved library by uploader.
queue.title: Queue
queue.active: Queue is active and waiting for the next finish.
queue.startArm: Arm the queue or start the first queued track.
queue.stopPause: Pause queue mode without clearing the list.
queue.stopKeep: Disable auto-advance and keep queued tracks.
queue.skipNow: Start the next queued track now.
queue.skipJump: Jump to the next queued track.
queue.autoplaySavedDesc: Load the saved library into queue and start playing it.
queue.autoplaySavedActiveDesc: Turn your saved music library into the active queue.
queue.autoplaySavedShuffleDesc: Shuffle the saved library into queue and start playing it.
queue.autoplaySavedShuffleActiveDesc: Shuffle your saved music library into the active queue.
queue.emptyDesc: Use save, playlists, or inline queue actions to add tracks.
queue.armed: Queue armed. It will start after the current song finishes.
queue.loadingShuffledSaved: Loading saved tracks into shuffled queue...
queue.errorExhausted: Queue ran out after a playback error.
speed.title: Playback Speed
speed.noPlayback: Start playback first, then use `speed:1.05` or the preview buttons.
import.title: Import folder as playlist
import.desc: Use `import: /path/to/folder` to turn local audio into a playlist.
import.hint: Type `import: /path/to/folder` to import local audio files as a playlist.
tags.chooseTrack: Choose a saved track first, then use the tag action to edit its tags.
tags.noMatch: No tag matches "{query}" yet. Select the add action to create it.
tags.hint: Type after `tag:` to add a new tag, or select an existing tag to remove it.
metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.chooseTrack: Choose a library track first, then use the edit action to update title, artist, or album.
metadata.chooseField: Choose which field to edit for "{title}".
metadata.albumHint: Type a new album name, or choose the clear action to remove it.
playlists.typeDifferent: Type a different name to rename this playlist.
playlists.chooseFor: Type a playlist name to create one for {title}.
playlists.chooseFirst: Choose a playlist first, then use the rename action.
panel.title: Music panel
panel.subtitle: Search, queue, and control playback without opening the launcher.
panel.searchPlaceholder: Search music, paste a URL, or use yt:/sc:/local:
panel.searchHint: Search {provider}, paste a URL, or switch to Saved and Queue tabs.
panel.typeMore: Type at least 2 characters to search {provider}.
panel.helperHint: The full command surface is still available in the launcher via >music-search.
panel.emptyPlaylists: No playlists matched this filter yet.
panel.emptyArtists: No saved artists matched this filter yet.
panel.emptyTags: No saved tags matched this filter yet.
panel.emptyScopedLibrary: No tracks are available in this section yet.
tooltip.saveFirst: Save first, then add to a playlist
artists.noArtists: Save tracks with uploader metadata to browse artists here.
preview.metadataParseError: Metadata preview could not be parsed.
settings.provider.label: Global provider
settings.provider.desc: Choose the default provider used for normal music searches when you do not use a prefix like `yt:` or `sc:`.
settings.sort.label: Default sort
settings.sort.desc: Choose how saved tracks are sorted in your library views.
settings.ytClient.label: YouTube player client
settings.ytClient.desc: Which yt-dlp player client to use for YouTube streams. Try switching if playback fails or is throttled.
settings.downloads.title: Downloads
settings.cache.label: Max MP3 cache size
settings.cache.desc: Limit the download folder size in MB. Older files are pruned after downloads. Set 0 for unlimited.
settings.autoSave.label: Save remote tracks as mp3 after playback starts
settings.autoSave.desc: After a YouTube or SoundCloud track successfully starts playing, also save an mp3 copy into the current download folder.
settings.bar.title: Bar Widget
settings.bar.hoverTitle.label: Show track title on hover
settings.bar.hoverTitle.desc: Expand the bar widget on hover to show and scroll the current track title.
settings.home.title: Home
settings.home.recent.label: Show Recently Played
settings.home.recent.desc: Show the recent listens section on the launcher home.
settings.home.top.label: Show Most Played
settings.home.top.desc: Show your top-played tracks on the launcher home.
settings.home.tags.label: Show Tags
settings.home.tags.desc: Show tag shortcuts on the launcher home.
settings.home.artists.label: Show Artists
settings.home.artists.desc: Show artist browse shortcuts on the launcher home.
settings.home.playlists.label: Show Playlists
settings.home.playlists.desc: Show playlist shortcuts on the launcher home.
settings.panel.title: Panel
settings.panel.defaultTab.label: Default panel tab
settings.panel.defaultTab.desc: Choose which top-level tab opens first when you open the panel.
settings.panel.defaultLibrarySection.des: Choose which secondary section opens first inside the Saved tab.
settings.panel.density.label: Panel density
settings.panel.density.desc: Adjust spacing and card sizing in the panel.
settings.panel.header.label: Show panel header
settings.panel.header.desc: Show the title row with launcher, settings, and close actions at the top of the panel.
settings.panel.nowPlaying.label: Show now-playing block
settings.panel.nowPlaying.desc: Show the playback controls and current track block at the top of the panel.
settings.panel.playbackProgress.label: Show playback progress
settings.panel.playbackProgress.desc: Show the seek bar and time row in the now-playing block.
settings.panel.providerChips.label: Show provider chips
settings.panel.providerChips.desc: Show the YouTube, SoundCloud, and Local provider shortcuts on the Search tab.
settings.panel.recentTracks.label: Show recent saved tracks
settings.panel.recentTracks.desc: Show recently saved tracks below the panel search helper when the Search tab is empty.
settings.panel.searchHelper.label: Show search helper
settings.panel.searchHelper.desc: Show the search hint and launcher tip when the Search tab is empty.
settings.panel.preview.label: Show track preview
settings.panel.preview.desc: Show a preview pane alongside the panel tabs. Click a track card header to inspect it.
settings.panel.urlActions.label: Show URL actions
settings.panel.urlActions.desc: Show Play URL, Save URL, and Queue URL buttons when the search field contains a URL.
settings.panel.speedControls.label: Show speed controls
settings.panel.speedControls.desc: Show playback speed controls in the now-playing area.
settings.panel.queueControls.label: Show queue controls
settings.panel.queueControls.desc: Show the Start, Skip, and Clear buttons at the top of the Queue tab.
settings.panel.statusBanner.label: Show status banner
settings.panel.statusBanner.desc: Show success and error notices between the playback block and the tab area.
settings.preview.title: Preview
settings.preview.metadata.label: Rich Preview Metadata
settings.preview.metadata.desc: Choose when the launcher preview should fetch thumbnails, descriptions, views, and upload details.
settings.preview.metadata.neverHint: Preview panels will stay lightweight and use only the metadata already present in the launcher results.
settings.preview.metadata.playingHint: Only the currently playing item will fetch richer preview data. Saved and search results stay fast.
settings.preview.metadata.alwaysHint: Every preview can fetch richer metadata, including thumbnails and long-form details.
settings.preview.thumbnail.label: Thumbnail size
settings.preview.thumbnail.desc: Choose how large the preview artwork appears in the side panel.
settings.preview.chips.label: Show preview chips
settings.preview.chips.desc: Show source, saved, starting, and tag chips above the track title in the preview.
settings.metadata.title: Visible Metadata
settings.metadata.uploader.label: Show uploader
settings.metadata.uploader.desc: Display artist/uploader names in launcher results and preview panels.
settings.metadata.album.label: Show album
settings.metadata.album.desc: Display album metadata when it is available, especially for local files.
settings.metadata.duration.label: Show duration
settings.metadata.duration.desc: Display track length in launcher descriptions and preview details.
settings.metadata.rating.label: Show ratings
settings.metadata.rating.desc: Include star ratings in launcher descriptions for saved tracks.
settings.metadata.tags.label: Show tags
settings.metadata.tags.desc: Include track tags in launcher descriptions.
settings.metadata.playStats.label: Show play stats
settings.metadata.playStats.desc: Display play counts and last-played information in the home view and preview.
settings.metadata.status.label: Show status
settings.metadata.status.desc: Display availability metadata like public or unlisted in rich preview details.
